name: EU AI Act Compliance
description: By MEOK AI Labs — The only MCP server that automates EU AI Act compliance checking. Risk classification, 42-point audit, documentation, penalties, deadlines.

tools.name: classify_ai_risk
tools.description: Classify an AI system's risk level under the EU AI Act.

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Run an EU AI Act compliance check against Articles 9-15 requirements.

tools.name: generate_documentation
tools.description: Generate Article 11 / Annex IV compliant technical documentation template.

tools.name: assess_penalties
tools.description: Calculate potential EU AI Act penalties for a given violation type.

tools.name: get_timeline
tools.description: Get key EU AI Act implementation dates and deadlines.

tools.name: audit_report
tools.description: Generate a complete EU AI Act audit report.

tools.name: multi_jurisdiction_map
tools.description: Map EU AI Act articles to equivalent requirements in UK, Singapore, Canada, and US NIST.
